cleavage agent: digested with trypsin at 1:50 trypsin-to-protein mass ratio
fragmentation method: the timsTOF Pro was operated in parallel accumulation serial fragmentation (PASEF) mode
instrument: the timsTOF Pro (Bruker Daltonics, Billerica, USA) mass spectrometry
ionization type: The electrospray voltage applied was 1.60 kV
labeling: the organoids were cultured with GM or LM (n = 3 per groups) were collected at d 6 for RNA isolation.
